# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Clarify Project Requirements
    - Python project for image analysis of cellular morphology and mitochondria networks in TIFF stacks. Use numpy, scipy, scikit-image, matplotlib, tifffile. Structure for data input/output, image processing, analysis scripts, and visualization. Main script, example notebook, requirements.txt.
    - In Harmony image IDs for this project, timepoints are encoded with the 'K' token, not 'T'.
